title: useHashRouting: hashchange listener rebinds whenever useWindowManager callbacks change identity
summary: Effect declares syncWindowsFromHash inline and lists openWindow/closeWindow/setActiveTab as deps. When the windowsSlice actions change referential identity, the hashchange listener is detached and reattached. A windowsRef already exists; add a callbacksRef for the actions so the effect runs once.
proposed_action: Move openWindow/closeWindow/setActiveTab into a ref (advanced-use-latest) or memoize them at the store-selector boundary. Keep the effect's deps array empty.

title: AppWindow resize/autocenter effects have unstable object deps (minSize, effectiveMax)
summary: Two effects depend on minSize.height/width and effectiveMax.height/width. effectiveMax is memoized but minSize is a prop that could be passed as an inline object; any caller doing minSize={{ width, height }} would thrash both effects per render.
proposed_action: Document the rule or extract primitive deps explicitly; alternatively accept minSize as a tuple of primitives. No change required if all callers pass stable refs.

title: WebGLSun useEffectEvent usage is correct; flagged only to prevent reviewer 'fixes'
summary: Component uses React.useEffectEvent + store.subscribe() to isolate the WebGL render loop from store-triggered re-renders. Exemplary pattern; do not refactor.
proposed_action: No change. Consider documenting the pattern in docs/ as a reference implementation.

title: useTypewriter uses cross-effect refs that survive message changes (potential index overflow)
summary: indexRef / phaseRef / charRef persist across [messages] re-runs. Changing messages to a shorter array while mid-animation would read past the new length.
proposed_action: Reset indexRef to 0 and charRef to 0 at the top of the effect (before starting tick), or ship a hook-level assertion.

title: CommandPalette keyboard listener is intentionally unbound to `open` state
summary: setOpen((prev) => !prev) with empty deps is the correct pattern for global hotkeys. Recorded here so reviewers don't 'fix' it by adding `open` to deps.
proposed_action: No change.

title: ManifestoBook: key={i} over dynamically-rebuilt words array
summary: words = justified.segments.filter(!isSpace); rendered with `{w.text}`. Reflow can change segment boundaries and reuse DOM nodes incorrectly.
proposed_action: Use key={`${idx}-${i}-${w.text}`} or prefer stable identity from the layout engine's word IDs.

title: GoodNewsLegacyApp: key={index} over layout-derived result.els (6 occurrences)
summary: result.els is regenerated wholesale each layout pass. Index keys work empirically because every width change invalidates the entire list. Any future focus-preservation or intersection-observer patterns on individual elements would break.
proposed_action: Prefer composite keys: `${element.kind}-${element.x}-${element.y}-${element.text ?? ''}`. Not urgent.

title: GoodNewsLegacyApp: key={index} over deterministic ruleXs array
summary: ruleXs values are deterministic from containerWidth; use ruleX as key instead of index for stable identity.
proposed_action: key={`rule-${ruleX}`}

title: ctrl-preview inline style objects (5+ props) re-created every render
summary: Multiple style={{ width, padding, border, boxShadow, justifyContent, ... }} in a preview scaffold. Hoist to module-level consts or useMemo to avoid identity churn in large render trees.
proposed_action: Extract recurring style objects to module-level constants at the top of the file.

title: NumberInput inline style re-created every render
summary: Inside NumberField.Input render, a style object with 5+ properties is rebuilt each parent render. Active-state branch also creates an object literal.
proposed_action: Hoist base style to a module const; merge active branch via useMemo keyed on `active` + `disabled`.

title: GoodNewsLegacyApp/pretext renderers: inline styles per-element are unavoidable
summary: Pretext layout engine outputs per-element absolute x/y/width/fontSize/lineHeight. Inline styles are the only viable surface; memoization adds nothing.
proposed_action: No change.

title: LayerTreeRow: clickable div without role/tabIndex/keyboard handler
summary: Outer row div uses `cursor-pointer onClick={onSelect}` with no a11y affordances. Keyboard users cannot activate rows.
proposed_action: Add role="button" tabIndex={0} onKeyDown (Enter/Space) that calls onSelect.

title: ColorSwatch: onClick with role=option but no tabIndex/keyboard
summary: Interactive div with role="option" but no tabIndex, no keyboard handler. Swatch cannot be activated by keyboard.
proposed_action: When interactive, add tabIndex={0} and onKeyDown for Enter/Space. Consider making the element a <button type="button"> if there's no listbox parent.

title: GoodNewsLegacyApp DropCapBox: clickable div without role/keyboard
summary: Div has onClick cycling drop-cap scale and onMouseEnter/Leave pattern cycling, but no role, tabIndex, or keyboard handler.
proposed_action: Wrap the interactive surface in a <button type="button">, preserving the existing mouseenter/leave handlers.

title: ctrl-preview mode toggle: clickable div with inline style, no a11y
summary: Preview UI <div onClick> toggling min/max with inline style. Preview scaffolding is lower priority but the pattern can leak into production code.
proposed_action: Replace with <button type="button"> or add role+tabIndex+onKeyDown.

title: PropControls.NumberControl: derived-state + sync useEffect anti-pattern
summary: const [raw, setRaw] = useState(String(value)); useEffect(() => setRaw(String(value)), [value]). Textbook rerender-derived-state-no-effect violation — the effect exists only to mirror the prop into local state.
proposed_action: Drop the useState+useEffect pair. Use a controlled <input value={String(value)}> and keep a ref for transient in-progress edits, committing on blur. Alternatively track an `editing` boolean + local string, and reset on blur.

title: PropControls inputs render at text-[10px] (below 12px minimum)
summary: Five instances of text-[10px] on inputs and labels. Registry previewer is an internal tool but this type size is below accessibility minimum (12px).
proposed_action: Bump to text-xs (12px via tokens) or add an approved exception metadata line per RDNA guidelines.

title: DesignSystemTab placeholder label uses text-[10px]
summary: Single span with text-[10px] in a placeholder label. User-facing.
proposed_action: Bump to text-xs or add an exception metadata line.

title: CTRL package inline fontSize:10 is likely intentional instrument-panel aesthetic
summary: CTRL is a DAW-style controls package with an intentional tight-type aesthetic. Hardcoded fontSize:10 recurs consistently, suggesting a design decision rather than drift.
proposed_action: Wrap in a CTRL semantic token (e.g., --ctrl-label-size: 10px) so it stops being 'hardcoded' in lint and becomes traceable. No visual change required.

title: ctrl-preview uses bg-black on visible surfaces (should tint toward brand hue or use semantic token)
summary: Two preview cells use bg-black. CTRL package already defines bg-ctrl-cell-bg that maps to a near-black; use the semantic token for consistency.
proposed_action: Replace bg-black with bg-ctrl-cell-bg where appropriate.

title: CTRL package bg-black usage is intentional per DAW aesthetic
summary: CTRL components render black backgrounds as part of the instrument-panel look. Confirm with design-system owners whether to alias via var(--color-ctrl-panel-bg) or keep bg-black directly.
proposed_action: No change unless design-system team decides to introduce a semantic token.
